name: terminal_stdin
description: S5.Z task 4 -- per-bg-tab stdin input. Drives the LLM into spawning a long-lived bg process (`more` -- reads from stdin, exits on EOF, doesn't echo immediately so the process stays alive long enough to be inspected). Asserts that the terminal panel surfaces a `locus.terminal.stdin_input.<id>` text control under the bg tab. Spec-aligned: sync `Run` tab gets NO input row; bg tabs always do. Requires LM Studio at http://127.0.0.1:1234 with a tool-calling model.

args.text: Use run_command_bg to start the command: more

steps.comment: Wait for the agent to be idle -- by then run_command_bg has spawned the bg process AND the first-command auto-show has raised the terminal pane. Pressing Ctrl+` here would TOGGLE the pane back to hidden (it's a toggle, not show-if-hidden), so we skip it.

Select the bg tab (index 1) FIRST so wxWidgets realizes its child widgets -- non-active notebook pages stay unrealized and their named children won't appear in the UIA tree. With the bg tab active the stdin_input widget materializes and `find` can locate it.
